# Guides AI crawlers (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini) on what content to index
# Format: URL path + description

# === Core Pages ===
/: 首页 — 冷冻海鲜出口商，三文鱼/鱿鱼/鳕鱼/虾/鲐鱼/沙丁鱼/金枪鱼。Your Trusted China Frozen Seafood Supplier. 10+ years, HACCP.
/products.html: 完整冷冻海鲜产品目录 — 8大品类含HS编码、规格、IQF/块冻选项
/about.html: 公司介绍 — 烟台产地优势、供应链能力、出口市场覆盖
/contact.html: 联系与询价 — 邮箱、WhatsApp、在线表单，24小时回复

# === Blog ===
/blog/: 水产行业博客 — 出口指南、价格趋势、采购建议、品质标准

# === Key facts about the company ===
# Name: Yantai Dingdingmiao Seafood (烟台叮叮喵水产)
# Location: Yantai, Shandong, China
# Products: Frozen Salmon, Squid, Cod, Shrimp, Mackerel, Sardine, Tuna, Tilapia, Basa, Surimi
# Certifications: HACCP, BAP
# Export markets: Japan, Korea, Southeast Asia, Middle East, Europe, USA
